metadata.description: The complete solo developer system: a full product team, a production audit/debug/fix toolkit (site-doctor), a stack-aware layer, and a workflow layer (git, spec, repo intelligence, security, browser QA, quality gates, AI-agent orchestration, growth), unified by the standard 16-file .solo/ project memory that can sync out to Obsidian and Grafana. 17 plugins, 56 skills, 100 slash commands, 10 stdlib helper scripts covering intake -> spec -> plan -> design -> build -> review -> test -> browser-QA -> audit -> gate -> release -> operate -> document -> sync, with /solo:full-team-dev running the whole cycle, /solo:self-check verifying the suite, strict evidence-based gates with 0-100 launch scoring, and two-mode (connector/manual) vendor audits for Cloudflare, Vercel, Supabase, tags, and payments.

plugins.name: solo
plugins.description: The heart of the solo workflow: persistent project memory across sessions, syncing it outward, self-checking the whole suite, and orchestrating the full team. Skills: project-memory-manager (owns the standard 16-file .solo/ contract), memory-sync (Obsidian + Grafana), suite-integrity (mechanical self-check with a stdlib script). Commands: /solo:start-session, /solo:end-session, /solo:run-cycle, /solo:full-team-dev (idea → production, gates enforced), /solo:handoff-memory, /solo:next-step, /solo:project-status, /solo:self-check, /solo:sync-obsidian, /solo:sync-grafana.

plugins.name: stack
plugins.description: Stack-aware auditing for the tools solo devs actually use. Skills: stack-advisor, cloudflare-audit, vercel-audit, supabase-audit (leads with RLS), tag-audit, payments-audit, and connector-auditor (uses live Vercel/Supabase/GitHub/Cloudflare data when a connector is available). Commands: /stack:intake, /stack:connector-check, /stack:audit-cloudflare, /stack:audit-vercel, /stack:audit-supabase, /stack:audit-tags, /stack:audit-payments. Every audit runs in Connector mode (live config, read-only) or Manual mode (asks for screenshots, config files, env-var names — never secrets) and states which it used.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Planning: PRD, architecture, task breakdown. Commands: /project:prd, /project:architecture, /project:task-breakdown. Skills: product-manager, software-architect.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design: UX flows, UI review, component system. Commands: /design:ui-review, /design:ux-flow, /design:component-system. Skill: ui-ux-designer.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development: build features, fix bugs, refactor, review code. Commands: /dev:implement-feature, /dev:fix-bug, /dev:refactor-code, /dev:code-review. Skills: fullstack-developer, code-reviewer.

plugins.name: test
plugins.description: Testing: unit, integration, e2e, edge cases. Commands: /test:unit, /test:integration, /test:e2e, /test:edge-cases. Skill: qa-engineer.

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Release: preflight, deploy plan, rollback plan, CI setup - drives site-doctor's deep checks when installed. Commands: /release:preflight, /release:deploy-plan, /release:rollback-plan, /release:ci-setup. Skills: devops-engineer, security-reviewer.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation for solo developers: README/docs upkeep, API docs, and a followable setup guide. Documentation-writer skill that keeps docs matched to code reality. Commands: /docs:update, /docs:api, /docs:setup-guide, /docs:runbook.

plugins.name: site-doctor
plugins.description: Production toolkit: 26 audit/debug/fix skills for websites and databases - security (OWASP), SEO, performance, accessibility, API, observability, infrastructure, deployment, cost, backups, compliance, data migration, mobile, content, analytics, load testing, incident response, dependencies, email deliverability, forms. 24 commands, 8 stdlib scripts. Reads/writes .solo/ memory: audit fix-lists become tasks.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git & repository workflow for solo devs: safe branches, clean commits, PR review, release notes, and GitHub issue sync. Skill: git-workflow-manager. Commands: /git:create-branch, /git:commit-plan, /git:pr-review, /git:release-notes, /git:sync-issues. Proposes and confirms before any write; never runs destructive git.

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Spec & planning: turn rough ideas into clear briefs, testable acceptance criteria, and API/data/env contracts before you build. Skills: acceptance-criteria-writer, api-contract-designer. Commands: /spec:feature-brief, /spec:acceptance, /spec:api-contract, /spec:data-contract, /spec:env-contract.

plugins.name: repo
plugins.description: Repo intelligence: understand a codebase before editing it — structure map, risk map, dependency map, dead-code finder, and onboarding guide. Skill: repo-analyzer (read-only). Commands: /repo:map, /repo:risk-map, /repo:dependency-map, /repo:find-dead-code, /repo:onboarding.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security plus: threat modeling, role/permission matrices, Supabase RLS testing, secret detection & rotation, and abuse-case analysis. Skill: authz-security-reviewer (pairs with site-doctor's security-review). Commands: /security:threat-model, /security:authz-matrix, /security:secrets-fix, /security:rls-test, /security:abuse-cases.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Real-browser QA: smoke-test core flows, catch console/network/hydration errors, review layout & responsiveness, test mobile breakpoints, and test forms end to end. Skill: browser-qa-engineer. Commands: /browser:smoke-test, /browser:console-errors, /browser:visual-check, /browser:mobile-test, /browser:form-submit-test.

plugins.name: gate
plugins.description: Quality gates that actually block: GO/NO-GO checkpoints with explicit blocker lists before coding, merge, and deploy, plus a production-readiness review that scores 12 categories 0-10 (overall /100) and returns a launch status — BLOCKED / SAFE TO LAUNCH / LAUNCH WITH WARNINGS — where hard blockers force BLOCKED regardless of score. Skills: quality-gatekeeper, production-readiness-reviewer. Commands: /gate:before-code, /gate:before-merge, /gate:before-deploy, /gate:production-ready, /gate:score-project.

plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: AI coding workflow: sharpen prompts, check agent handoffs, review AI-generated code for hallucinations and missing files, route tasks to the right model, repair failed output, and set up multi-agent rooms from templates. Skills: ai-output-auditor, agent-room-templates (ships 4 ready-made agentsrooms (validated by scripts/validate_rooms.py)/*.json room files: full-team-website, site-doctor-audit, production-release, bug-fix-loop). Commands: /ai:prompt-improve, /ai:handoff-check, /ai:review-output, /ai:compare-models, /ai:repair-cycle, /ai:agent-rooms.

plugins.name: growth
plugins.description: Growth: audit the conversion funnel and find where users drop off and why. Skill: conversion-optimizer (delegates measurement to site-doctor analytics/forms). Command: /growth:conversion-audit.
